problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
